{
    "cli": "edq.cli.config.list",
    "setup_funcs": [
        "edq.testing.cli.create_directory_structure",
    ],
    "arguments": [
        "--config-global", "global.json",
        "--config-file", "foo.json",
        "--config-file", "bar.json",
        "--config", "pass=password1234",
        "--config", "server=http://test.edulinq.org"
    ],
    "work_dir": "__TEMP_DIR__()",
    "extra_options": {
        "directory_structure": [
            ["global.json", {
            }],
            ["foo.json", {
                "user": "user@test.edulinq.org",
            }],
            ["bar.json", {
                "api-key": "KEY-1234567890",
            }],
        ],
    },
}
---
Key	Value
api-key	KEY-1234567890
pass	password1234
server	http://test.edulinq.org
user	user@test.edulinq.org
